CustomField.description: GTMS-4702 - Checkbox used in conjunction with validation rule to block any updates on ZoomInfo ID, ZoomInfo Parent or ZoomInfo Ultimate parent id fields when this field is checked.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checkbox used in conjunction with validation rule to block any updates on ZoomInfo ID, ZoomInfo Parent or ZoomInfo Ultimate parent id fields when this field is checked.
CustomField.label: Exclude from Hierarchy Enrichment
